.file-embed.background: rgba(238, 236, 213, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgba(238, 236, 213, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgba(238, 236, 213, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgba(238, 236, 213, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(238, 236, 213, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-content.background: rgba(242, 239, 223, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-title.background: rgba(8, 109, 221, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(139, 108, 239, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 251, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(242, 239, 223) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(254, 242, 213) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(242, 239, 223) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(242, 239, 223) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(242, 239, 223) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(248, 245, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(243, 245, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
